'''jadada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coagonism|coagonism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-d-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coagonism|coagonism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jadada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jædædæth|jædædæth]] || [[word:jædædæj|jædædæj]] || [[word:jædædæsh|jædædæsh]] || [[word:jædædæ|jædædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jadadadath|jadadadath]] || [[word:jadadadaj|jadadadaj]] || [[word:jadadadash|jadadadash]] || [[word:jadadada|jadadada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jadadath|jadadath]] || [[word:jadadaj|jadadaj]] || [[word:jadadash|jadadash]] || [[word:jadada|jadada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jadafdath|jadafdath]] || [[word:jadafdaj|jadafdaj]] || [[word:jadafdash|jadafdash]] || [[word:jadafdaf|jadafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jadadatha|jadadatha]] || [[word:jadadaja|jadadaja]] || [[word:jadadasha|jadadasha]] || [[word:jadadaka|jadadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jadadath|jadadath]] || [[word:jadadaj|jadadaj]] || [[word:jadadash|jadadash]] || [[word:jadada|jadada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jadadathal|jadadathal]] || [[word:jadadajal|jadadajal]] || [[word:jadadashal|jadadashal]] || [[word:jadadakal|jadadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jadadathatha|jadadathatha]] || [[word:jadadajaja|jadadajaja]] || [[word:jadadashasha|jadadashasha]] || [[word:jadadaka|jadadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jadadathan|jadadathan]] || [[word:jadadajan|jadadajan]] || [[word:jadadashan|jadadashan]] || [[word:jadadakan|jadadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jadadathaoro|jadadathaoro]] || [[word:jadadajaoro|jadadajaoro]] || [[word:jadadashaoro|jadadashaoro]] || [[word:jadadakaoro|jadadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
